name: Benzbromarone
description: Benzbromarone has been used in trials studying the basic science and treatment of Heart Failure, Hyperuricemia, Chronic Kidney Disease, Abnormal Renal Function, and Gout and Asymptomatic Hyperuricemia.

interactions.name: Sarilumab
interactions.description: Sarilumab may increase the immunosuppressive activities of Benzbromarone.

interactions.name: Cilostazol
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cilostazol can be increased when it is combined with Benzbromarone.
